hook.text: NOW SPURS WANT UNITED'S TOP MIDFIELD TARGET

beats.text: DE ZERBI'S TOTTENHAM JOIN THE FERNANDES RACE
WEST HAM DEMAND £80M — UNITED WON'T MATCH THAT
UNITED REMAIN CONFIDENT BUT THE RACE IS ON

caption: The Fernandes race is getting crowded 🔴 David Ornstein reports Tottenham Hotspur are now serious suitors for West Ham's Mateus Fernandes — driven by Roberto De Zerbi's midfield rebuild. That puts Spurs alongside United, Real Madrid and PSG in chasing the 21-year-old. West Ham are holding firm at £80m and United won't match that valuation — but the Red Devils still believe they'll get their man. With Spurs now in the mix, time is running out. Will United win this race? 👇 REPORTED — per The Athletic (Ornstein). #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
